inputs.label: Deuterium Density (n_D)
inputs.businessContext: Density of deuterium ions in the fusion plasma, measured in units of 10^20 particles per cubic meter.

inputs.label: Tritium Density (n_T)
inputs.businessContext: Density of tritium ions in the fusion plasma, measured in units of 10^20 particles per cubic meter.

inputs.label: Ion Temperature (T)
inputs.businessContext: Plasma ion temperature in kilo-electronvolts (keV), typically 10-20 keV for DT fusion.

inputs.label: Energy Confinement Time (τ)
inputs.businessContext: Energy confinement time in seconds, representing how well the plasma retains its heat.
